texto: I lack the imagination. For that reason I have to pack, stuff into my pockets odds and ends, passport, money, and go see what it's really like. Whenever the time of year or the weather changes, I have to pack up whatever I can't do without and visit all those places I've been before, to make sure they still exist
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrzej Stasiuk: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I lack the imagination. For that reason I have to pack, stuff into my pockets odds and ends, pass…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, travel, imagination pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e viagem.
